library.name: Plyr
library.description: Accessible HTML5 media player (JS and CSS). Bundled files: plyr.min.js, plyr.polyfilled.min.js, plyr.css, plyr.min.css (minified stylesheet), and custom.css (plugin-specific overrides).

library.name: hls.js
library.description: JavaScript library that plays HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) in browsers using Media Source Extensions.

library.name: Bowser
library.description: Browser and engine detection library (minified webpack bundle). When upgrading, compare SHA-256 with the official npm package and update the version element.
